executive_summary: Latest updates from 7 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 7 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: Rubio says US may review Nato ties after Iran war. Hezbollah fires missiles as Israel strikes Beirut with air strikes. Resistance will continue against US, Israel: Iran’s supreme leader Mojtaba Khame. Middle East Crisis Live Updates: Saudi Arabia intercepts, destroys Iranian drone. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: Hezbollah fires missiles as Israel strikes Beirut with air strikes
key_developments.detail: Hezbollah said it launched missiles at targets in northern Israel, including the Mahanim camp east of Safed and a military industries site near Haifa. key_developments.headline: Channel 13: Israel turns to alternative air defences amid attacks
key_developments.detail: Israel has begun using air defence systems not originally designed to intercept Iranian missiles as it faces mounting challenges in countering incoming attacks, Channel 13 reported. Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
